channel.title: OpenAI Jalapeno Broadcom chip - Bingחדשות
channel.copyright: זכויות יוצרים ‎\xc2\xa9 2026 Microsoft. כל הזכויות שמורות. לא ניתן להשתמש בתוצאות XML אלה, לשכפל אותן או לשדר אותן בכל אמצעי או לכל מטרה למעט לעיבוד תוצאות Bing בתוך צובר RSS לשימושך האישי שאינו מסחרי. כל שימוש אחר בתוצאות אלה מחייב אישור מפורש בכתב מ- Microsoft Corporation. על-ידי גישה לדף אינטרנט זה או שימוש בתוצאות אלה בכל אופן שהוא, אתה מביע את הסכמתך להיות כפוף להגבלות לעיל.

item.title: OpenAI & Broadcom unveil 'Jalapeno', their custom AI chip for LLMs
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom have unveiled 'Jalapeno,' OpenAI's first custom AI processor for LLM inference. Developed in nine months, it shows superior performance per watt and will be deployed at a gigawatt ...

item.title: Broadcom, OpenAI unveil ‘Jalapeño’ AI inference chip
item.description: Broadcom Inc. AVGO, alongside OpenAI, unveiled Jalapeño, OpenAI’s first custom Intelligence Processor designed specifically for large language model (LLM) inference on Wednesday. • What’s ahead for ...

item.title: Jalapeño Is The First AI Chip From OpenAI And Broadcom
item.description: It's a spicy start for the AI company's collaboration with the chip maker.

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

item.title: OpenAI unveils first chip as part of Broadcom deal in effort to 'build the full stack'
item.description: Eight months after announcing a custom chip deal, OpenAI and Broadcom are revealing their first joint project: Jalapeño.

item.title: OpenAI just announced its first custom chip to help ChatGPT run better
item.description: OpenAI on Wednesday announced its first custom AI chip in a step towards expanding beyond consumer products to become a player in AI infrastructure.

item.title: OpenAI Gets its First Custom Chip, in Jalapeño Flavor
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom unveiled Jalapeño, OpenAI’s first custom-designed AI chip — which went from initial design to production-ready blueprint in nine months.

item.title: OpenAI unveils first custom AI chip 'Jalapeno' in partnership with Broadcom
item.description: OpenAI has entered the AI chip race with Jalapeño, a custom inference processor developed with Broadcom to power ChatGPT and expand access to advanced AI.

item.title: OpenAI unveils custom chip it designed with Broadcom to boost its AI infrastructure
item.description: By Max A. Cherney SAN FRANCISCO, June 24 (Reuters) - OpenAI showed off the company's first custom artificial intelligence chip designed in conjunction with Broadcom on Wednesday, as it seeks to speed ...

item.title: Broadcom and OpenAI Just Unveiled the New Jalapeño AI Chip. What That Means for AVGO Stock.
item.description: As Broadcom takes another major step in the AI race with OpenAI's first custom AI chip, here's how investors should approach AVGO stock.

item.title: OpenAI Distances Itself From Nvidia With Jalapeño, Its First In-House AI Chip
item.description: On Wednesday, OpenAI took its biggest step yet towards full technological independence with the unveiling of a new AI chip, dubbed Jalapeño, that it developed in collaboration with U.S. chipmaker ...

item.title: OpenAI’s Wild Week: A Custom Chip, 40% of the World’s DRAM, and a $500 Million Bet to Kill the Common Cold
item.description: Three things happened to OpenAI last week. The company went from being a model lab to something closer to a vertically integrated empire that wants to design its own silicon, own a chunk of the ...
